description: Open raw datasets used to rebuild the MedAgentBoard evaluation benchmark.

sources.name: TJH COVID-19 time-series cohort
sources.notes: These spreadsheets are the benchmark-local copies used by the deterministic rebuild.

sources.name: MIMIC-IV Clinical Database Demo in MEDS
sources.access: Open PhysioNet demo snapshot. The benchmark intentionally uses the public demo MEDS export instead of the credentialed full MIMIC-IV release.
sources.notes: The local copy can be refreshed with python data/medagentboard/scripts/fetch_mimic_demo_meds.py.
